description: Create comprehensive annotation conflict map showing all GO annotation sources and conflicts for CRMP1
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive annotation conflict diagram
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 9))
ax.set_xlim(0, 14)
ax.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax.axis('off')

# Title
ax.text(7, 9.5, 'CRMP1 GO Annotation Conflict Map', 
        ha='center', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(7, 9.1, 'Showing all hydrolase-related annotations and their evidence sources',
        ha='center', fontsize=10, color='gray')

# GO Term boxes
go_terms = {
    'GO:0016787': ('hydrolase activity', 2, 7.5, '#d5e8d4'),
    'GO:0016810': ('hydrolase, C-N\n(not peptide)', 5, 7.5, '#d5e8d4'),
    'GO:0016812': ('hydrolase, C-N\ncyclic amides', 8, 7.5, '#ffe6e6'),
    'GO:0004157': ('dihydropyrimidinase\nactivity', 11, 7.5, '#ffe6e6'),
}

for go_id, (label, x, y, color) in go_terms.items():
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((x-1.2, y-0.5), 2.4, 1.0, 
                                     boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", 
                                     facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.text(x, y+0.1, go_id, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(x, y-0.2, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)

# Arrows between GO terms (is_a)
for x1, x2 in [(3.2, 3.8), (6.2, 6.8), (9.2, 9.8)]:
    ax.annotate('', xy=(x2, 7.5), xytext=(x1, 7.5),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1.5))

# Annotation boxes below
y_ann = 5.5

# GO:0016787 - IEA
rect1 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.5, y_ann-0.4), 2.6, 0.8,
                                 boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", facecolor='#fff2cc', edgecolor='orange')
ax.add_patch(rect1)
ax.text(1.8, y_ann+0.05, 'enables [IEA]\nInterPro IPR006680', ha='center', fontsize=7)
ax.annotate('', xy=(2, 7.0), xytext=(1.8, y_ann+0.4),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='orange', lw=1))

# GO:0016810 - IEA
rect2 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((3.7, y_ann-0.4), 2.6, 0.8,
                                 boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", facecolor='#fff2cc', edgecolor='orange')
ax.add_patch(rect2)
ax.text(5, y_ann+0.05, 'enables [IEA]\nInterPro IPR011059', ha='center', fontsize=7)
ax.annotate('', xy=(5, 7.0), xytext=(5, y_ann+0.4),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='orange', lw=1))

# GO:0016812 - CONFLICT
rect3a = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((6.5, y_ann+0.1), 2.6, 0.5,
                                  boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", facecolor='#ffcccc', edgecolor='red', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rect3a)
ax.text(7.8, y_ann+0.35, 'enables [IBA] ← CONFLICT', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='red', fontweight='bold')

rect3b = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((6.5, y_ann-0.55), 2.6, 0.5,
                                  boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", facecolor='#ccffcc', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rect3b)
ax.text(7.8, y_ann-0.3, 'NOT|enables [IBA] ✓', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='green', fontweight='bold')

ax.annotate('', xy=(8, 7.0), xytext=(7.8, y_ann+0.6),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5))

# GO:0004157 - NOT
rect4a = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((9.7, y_ann-0.55), 2.6, 0.5,
                                  boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", facecolor='#ccffcc', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rect4a)
ax.text(11, y_ann-0.3, 'NOT|enables [IBA] ✓', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='green', fontweight='bold')

ax.annotate('', xy=(11, 7.0), xytext=(11, y_ann-0.05),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='green', lw=1.5))

# TAS annotation (root cause)
rect_tas = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((3.5, 3.0), 7, 1.0,
                                    boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", facecolor='#ffe0b2', edgecolor='#e65100', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rect_tas)
ax.text(7, 3.7, 'ROOT CAUSE: PMID:8973361 (Hamajima et al. 1996)', 
        ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#e65100')
ax.text(7, 3.3, 'Named proteins "DHPase-Related" based on 57-59% sequence identity only', 
        ha='center', fontsize=8)
ax.text(7, 3.0, 'TAS evidence assigned to GO:0004157 and GO:0006139 — NO enzymatic assay in paper', 
        ha='center', fontsize=7, style='italic')

ax.annotate('', xy=(5, y_ann-0.4), xytext=(5.5, 4.0),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#e65100', lw=1.5, linestyle='--'))
ax.annotate('', xy=(7.8, y_ann-0.55), xytext=(7.5, 4.0),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#e65100', lw=1.5, linestyle='--'))

# Evidence summary box
evidence_box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.3, 0.3), 13.4, 2.2,
                                        boxstyle="round,pad=0.1", facecolor='#e8f5e9', edgecolor='#2e7d32')
ax.add_patch(evidence_box)
ax.text(7, 2.2, 'COMPUTATIONAL & STRUCTURAL EVIDENCE (THIS ANALYSIS)', 
        ha='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#2e7d32')
evidence_lines = [
    '• 6/8 active site residues substituted (EMBOSS Needle alignment, 52.8% identity)',
    '• Only 1/6 zinc-coordinating sidechains retained (AlphaFold structural analysis, pLDDT >96)',
    '• GLY at position 332 — no sidechain, zinc coordination physically impossible',
    '• Active site loss universal across all metazoan CRMPs (human → Drosophila)',
    '• Crystal structures explicitly state: "they have lost the enzymatic active site" (PMID:28044206)',
    '• UniProt names CRMP1 "Inactive dihydropyrimidinase" — no EC number assigned',
]
for i, line in enumerate(evidence_lines):
    ax.text(1, 1.85 - i*0.25, line, fontsize=7, color='#1b5e20')

# Legend
legend_items = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#fff2cc', edgecolor='orange', label='IEA (domain-based)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#ffcccc', edgecolor='red', label='Conflicting positive IBA'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#ccffcc', edgecolor='green', label='NOT annotation (correct)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#ffe0b2', edgecolor='#e65100', label='TAS root cause'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_items, loc='upper left', fontsize=8, framealpha=0.9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/annotation_conflict_map.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Annotation conflict map saved")
